## Feature Description
Describe the feature clearly and concisely.

## Problem It Solves
What problem or use case does this address?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work?

## Alternative Solutions
Are there alternative approaches?

## Benefits
- Benefit 1
- Benefit 2
- Benefit 3

## Example Usage
```typescript
// How would this be used?
```

## Additional Context
Any other context or mockups?

## Checklist
- [ ] I've searched existing issues
- [ ] Feature aligns with project goals
- [ ] I can explain the benefit
